qa_pair.question: What is the 12-digit UPC of the item with SKU GLMY-OS-G031?
Which SKU in the catalog has the UPC 767667290310?
What product type did Walmart assign to the item with SKU FTGM-42280802100?
In the variant group ULZ-SL03, which SKU is the primary variant?
In the variant group ULZ-SL03, which SKU is the White color variant?
What is the name of the grouping attribute used by variant group GLMY-TN07?
According to the current item spec (feedType MP_ITEM), how many fields are required in MPItemFeedHeader?
According to the current item spec for the product type "Lawn Mower Parts", how many attributes are required in the Orderable section?
What is the 14-digit GTIN of the item with SKU KX-DC-1?
What is the Walmart product ID (wpid) of the item with SKU MXJ-Insta360-7?
